creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Exp-run results are available at:  http://gohan4.ysv.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=head-amd64-PR191933-default&build=2014-07-23_06h21m55s

There were 2 new failures:

+ {"origin"=>"editors/libreoffice", "pkgname"=>"libreoffice-4.2.5_2", "phase"=>"build", "errortype"=>"???"}
+ {"origin"=>"net/freeradius3", "pkgname"=>"freeradius3-3.0.3_2", "phase"=>"stage", "errortype"=>"???"}

Failure logs:

http://gohan4.ysv.freebsd.org/data/head-amd64-PR191933-default/2014-07-23_06h21m55s/logs/errors/freeradius3-3.0.3_2.log

It seems build/make/src/src/lib/cbuff.mk and friends are generated by freeradius-server-3.0.3/scripts/boiler.mk with sed commands

http://gohan4.ysv.freebsd.org/data/head-amd64-PR191933-default/2014-07-23_06h21m55s/logs/errors/libreoffice-4.2.5_2.log

It seems there are some sed -e "s/-I/${ISYSTEM?}/g" in the configure script
